children.heading: Importer
children.label: 1 Importer
children.text: The term “importer” means any person who, for purposes of resale, transports into the United States puppies from a foreign country.

children.heading: Resale
children.label: 2 Resale
children.text: The term “resale” includes any transfer of ownership or control of an imported dog of less than 6 months of age to another person, for more than de minimis consideration.

children.label: B
children.text: has received all necessary vaccinations; and

children.label: C
children.text: is at least 6 months of age, if imported for resale.

children.heading: Lawful importation into Hawaii
children.label: B Lawful importation into Hawaii
children.text: Paragraph (1)(C) shall not apply to the lawful importation of a dog into the State of Hawaii from the British Isles, Australia, Guam, or New Zealand in compliance with the applicable regulations of the State of Hawaii and the other requirements of this section, if the dog is not transported out of the State of Hawaii for purposes of resale at less than 6 months of age.

children.heading: Implementation and regulations
children.label: c Implementation and regulations
children.text: The Secretary, the Secretary of Health and Human Services, the Secretary of Commerce, and the Secretary of Homeland Security shall promulgate such regulations as the Secretaries determine to be necessary to implement and enforce this section.
be subject to penalties under ; andsection 2149 of this title
provide for the care (including appropriate veterinary care), forfeiture, and adoption of each applicable dog, at the expense of the importer.
